parameters.text: =Found {{ $json.count_name }} leads. Reviewing them now — this takes about {{ $json.count_name }} minute(s). I'll update you as each one finishes.

=No more leads to Review. 

All done!

=Welcome to your Lead Gen Bot.

Here's what you can do:

/scrape {target} — Search for leads based on a target. AI reviews each one and returns the approved results.

/review — Go through leads waiting for your approval, one at a time.

/status — See a quick summary of your current pipeline.

Run /scrape to get started.

parameters.content:
🔀 COMMAND ROUTING
─────────────────────────────
"Commands" switch handles three bot commands:

- /scrape {target} — kicks off a new lead search.
  Extracts the target keyword, sets offset = 0,
  validates the target isn't blank, sends
  "Searching…" to the user.

- /review — loads the current lead queue
  from Supabase for human review.

- /start — sends the welcome/help message.

🔍 LEAD SCRAPING
─────────────────────────────
Calls fast-scan /scan-maps with the target
keyword. Returns up to 5 results per batch.

- Each result is split into individual items.
- Supabase RPC (check_lead_exists) flags
  duplicates before any processing happens.
- Only leads where duplicate = false continue.

Pagination: offset increments by 5 per batch.
Loop back to this node via "Set next batch offset"
until a full batch of 5 new leads is found.

🤖 AI EVALUATION
─────────────────────────────
Master payload is sent to fast-scan
/api/audit/evaluate for initial scoring.

"Valid or Corporate?" routes the result:

- Valid → Groq Llama 3 scores the lead with:
  agency fit score, priority level,
  services to offer, pitch angle,
  digital gaps, reasoning.
  Result is parsed and split into individual leads.

- Corporate → Lead is immediately saved to
  Supabase with status = blacklist.
  No further review needed.

🌐 DIGITAL FOOTPRINT AUDIT
─────────────────────────────
Three parallel branches run for each lead:

[Facebook branch]
Has FB Page? → Apify FB scraper
→ Format FB result / FB Null (if no page)

[Instagram branch]
Has IG Profile? → Apify IG scraper
→ Format IG result / IG Null (if no profile)

[Website branch]
Has website URL? → fast-scan /api/audit/website
→ Groq Vision Analysis → Qualitative Audit
→ Format result / Pass null (if audit fails)

All three branches merge into "Merge FB + IG +
Website data", then "Build master lead payload"
assembles the full picture before AI evaluation.

⚠️ "Wait for Apify rate limit" (30s) sits before
the IG scraper to avoid hitting Apify API limits.

💾 STORAGE
─────────────────────────────
"Normalize lead fields" flattens the nested
AI output into a clean flat structure.

All fields are written to the Supabase
"leads" table with status = 'new'.

👁️ HUMAN REVIEW LOOP
─────────────────────────────
Fetches up to 2 leads with status = 'new'
from Supabase, ordered by latest.

Each lead is shown as a Telegram card with:
  [Add (Approve)] [Discard (Blacklist)] [Done]

Button actions:
- Add     → status set to 'approved'
- Discard → status set to 'blacklist'
- Done    → exits the review loop
- More    → swaps the queue to show
             the second queued lead

"Only one lead in queue?" handles the case
where fewer than 2 leads are available.
"Empty Review" fires if the queue is empty.

💾 Full Batched Handler
─────────────────────────────
"Full batch scraped?" checks if 5 leads have
been processed (duplicate + corporate combined):
- Yes → stop and notify user with lead count.
- No  → loop back and scrape the next batch.

📥 ENTRY POINT
─────────────────────────────
Telegram bot receives all incoming events.

- "Call_back or Message" detects whether the
  event is an inline button press (callback_query)
  or a typed message.

- Routes to the correct handling branch before
  any command logic runs.
